[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000010011 4
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0100011111 6
5 0100000101 3
6 0001001011 4
7 0001110011 5

01 0000011010 3
12 0100000100 2
23 0000001000 1
34 0001000001 2

56 0010001000 2
67 0101100100 4
70 1000000000 1
